Poor Things (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $34,553,225Details
International Box Office $83,072,230
Worldwide Box Office $117,625,455
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $324,294
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $595,661
Total $919,955
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The tale and fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter. Under Baxter’s protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn, a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$661,230 (1.9% of total gross)
Legs:11.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:29.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:9 opening theaters/2,300 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,877,763

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 8th, 2023 (Limited) by Searchlight Pictures
December 22nd, 2023 (Expands Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: December 26th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
January 1st, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 12th, 2024 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
January 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
January 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Finland)
Video Release: February 27th, 2024 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: R for strong and pervasive sexual content, graphic nudity, disturbing material, gore, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2771 (cert #54287), 2/22/2023)
Running Time: 141 minutes
Award nomination: 2024 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Golden Globe Winner Best Picture—Musical or Comedy
Geographical setting: London
Plot point: Frankenstien's Monster, Romance
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Time period setting: 1800s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Searchlight Pictures , Film 4, TSG Entertainment, Element Pictures
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Ireland
Languages: English

Synopsis

The tale and fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter. Under Baxter’s protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn, a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.
